descriptors:
implementation of ideas and representations informed by
- constructed knowledge
- an individualised inquiry question that directs targeted investigation

implementation of ideas and representations that synthesise artists’ practices and new
knowledge and/or experiences

implementation of ideas and representations through an inquiry question that generates
relevant solutions in response to the defined stimulus
implementation of ideas in response to the stimulus
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

analysis and interpretation of the interrelationships between the individualised reaction to
the stimulus and the artworks and/or practices of self and others

experimentation and exploitation of visual forms and media that demonstrate synthesis of
new knowledge and understanding informed by the inquiry

analysis and interpretation of
- literal and non-literal meaning in the work of self and/or others
- the ways the selected artworks and context/s shape the inquiry

experimentation with visual forms and media informed by and building on research of
relevant key artists and relevant practices

analysis and interpretation of key artists’ works
- through specified context/s
- in response to the inquiry question

experimentation with visual forms and media in response to the stimulus and inquiry
question
interpretation of meaning and/or context in artworks
exploration of media, ideas and/or information
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

evaluation of contemporary and/or historical influences and their impact on intellectual
inquiry

justification of experimental approaches supported by critical understanding of the
strengths, implications and limitations of the visual inquiry

evaluation of the influences of relevant primary sources and secondary sources in the
formulation of ideas

justification of viewpoints supported by ideas and information presented through the
stimulus
identification of relevant sources in the formulation of ideas
statement of opinions relevant to ideas
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

ismg.criterion: Resolving — communicating as artist and audience

descriptors:
application of literacy skills through logical and connected ideas that unpack the inquiry
question

realisation of responses that reach conclusions and express meaning about the
interrelationships of knowledge and art practice to articulate a defined focus

application of literacy skills using referencing, relevant visual art terminology and language
conventions that recognise artwork features and practices

realisation of visual, written or spoken responses to communicate the body of work focus in
response to the stimulus
use of terminology to identify artworks
presentation of visual, written or spoken responses
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.

criteria.criterion: Resolving — communicating as artist and audience
